lines: I am a results-driven software engineer with 2+ years of experience in full-stack development, specializing in Java, Python, cloud infrastructure, and automation. Currently, I am a Software Engineer at Google, where I work on internal applications using GCP.

I graduated from the Indian Institute of Technology Madras with a B.Tech degree. My technical journey includes engineering high-performance data archiving workflows, redesigning mail export pipelines, and automating QA processes. I have a strong foundation in Data Structures, Algorithms, and Cloud Computing.
Beyond my professional life, I enjoy football, reading, and exploring new technologies that drive innovation and self-discovery.
name: M Mohsin Sackeer
